title: FL outer door shell interchange (aluminum panel family)
exact_claim: The F-450 driver's side front outer door shell (OEM family FL3Z-1520125-A / FL3Z-1520125-B) is shared with F-150 and other Super Duty platforms of the same design generation — as reported from Ford parts-interchange research.

target.configuration_summary: 2019 Ford F-450 Regular Cab Chassis Cab 4x2 DRW 145.3/60

sprint_narrative_note: Sprint Pass 4 labeled CROSS_VERIFIED; project does not promote Evidence Graph CROSS_VERIFIED until hashed local Tier A pages + Hard Rule 4 progression.
contradictions: Latch mechanisms, modules, mirror mounting plates, interior trim, and harnesses remain configuration-dependent and must not inherit from F-150 or other cabs.
allowed_downstream: Evaluate F-150 generation-band door shell scans as COMPARISON_REFERENCE baselines to reduce scan cost
forbidden_downstream: Auto-admit F-150 mesh as verified F-450 silo geometry
GEOMETRY freeze from interchange claim alone
